compiled_state.title: RED test — eval-daily-runner.sh behavioral tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Write behavioral tests for the eval-daily-runner.sh script before it exists.

## Test Approach
Create mock scripts for run-skill-evals.sh (controllable exit code + JSON output) and the ticket CLI (captures create/comment/list calls). Place mocks in isolated temp PATH. Invoke eval-daily-runner.sh and verify:

## Tests to Write
1. test_no_ticket_on_success — mock run-skill-evals.sh exits 0, verify no ticket create/comment calls made
2. test_creates_p0_bug_on_failure — mock run-skill-evals.sh exits 1 with failure output, mock ticket list returns no existing P0, verify ticket create called with title matching "EVAL REGRESSION: <date> — <N> skills failing" and priority 0
3. test_dedup_appends_comment_to_existing_p0 — mock run-skill-evals.sh exits 1, mock ticket list returns existing P0 with "EVAL REGRESSION:" prefix, verify ticket comment called (not ticket create)
4. test_title_format_contains_date_and_count — verify P0 title includes YYYY-MM-DD date and failure count parsed from eval output
5. test_exits_nonzero_on_eval_failure — verify eval-daily-runner.sh propagates non-zero exit code from evals

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests use isolated PATH for mocks
  Verify: grep -q 'PATH=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh
- [ ] Tests clean up via trap
  Verify: grep -q 'trap' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) before implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh (create)

comments.body: Fixed: RED test file created with behavioral tests for eval-daily-runner.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
